creator: dan@malaby.com
text:
I submitted this bug because I thought it worked with bulk but not with pkgclean, as it turn out I was wrong, it does not work with bulk either. Since I am the only one who seems to want to use include statements I just wrote a script file that does what I need, so there is no point in wasting time for something only one person wants, especially since I can create a workaround.

sorry for the bother and noise
